name: King's Legacy: A Crown Divided Collector's Edition
short_description: The Kingdom is falling apart! But a group of brave and righteous protectors are on their way! Join them in this fun kingdom builder game! Build your own towns and settlements, upgrade the production, manage your food, resources and luxuries, trade, craft and take care of your people.
detailed_description:
Rule the kingdom in King’s Legacy: A Crown Divided — a Time Management Strategy Builder where your decisions shape the future of a divided land!

The group of brave friends have gathered to defy him and protect the kingdom. Join them in this fun time management strategy game; build, explore, gather, produce, trade, clear roads and meet magical creatures of the forest. Build your own towns and settlements, upgrade the production, manage your food, resources and luxuries, trade, craft and take care of your people.

You can play in Relaxed, Normal or Extreme mode, each giving you the chance to win different medals and achievements along the way.

Try this in gorgeous colorful time management strategy city builder game now and put your strategic skills to the test!

🎯 Dozens of levels packed with city building fun

🏰 Build, upgrade, and defend your towns

⚡ Use powerful boosts & unlock achievements

🎧 Intriguing narrative — a plot with twists and memorable characters.

🛠️ 3 difficulty levels – from relaxed exploration to true challenge.

📴 Play completely offline — anytime, anywhere

🔒 No data collection — your privacy is safe

🕹 Gameplay

Click / Tap to gather resources, build houses, manage workers, and keep your people thriving as you progress through each level. Use boosts when things get tough — but the real reward is mastering strategy and efficiency!

🎮 Play your way

Expand, optimize, upgrade, and develop your settlements the way you like. Customizable challenge — Relaxed, Standard, and Extreme difficulty modes. Earn Achievements as you complete objectives and perfect your strategy.

🌌 Immersive adventure

The mix of colorful art, atmosphere, and story-rich progression paired with satisfying time-management and city-building mechanics. Whether you enjoy calm, casual resource gathering or intense strategic challenges — this game delivers both.

  • JOIN a group of brave and determined heroes on their adventure

  • MASTER DOZENS of exciting levels

  • WIN various medals and get achievements

  • BUILD, upgrade, trade, collect, clear the road, explore and much more...

  • 3 DIFFICULTY MODES; pick your mode and enjoy: Casual, Normal and Extreme; each with unique challenges, bonuses and achievements

  • DISCOVER and USE POWER-UPS that will help you achieve your goals

  • FIND hidden treasures, food, tools and more, and use them to benefit your city

  • BEAUTIFUL 4K high-definition graphics and animations

  • COLLECTOR'S EDITION includes: 20 bonus levels and additional achievements

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Croatian
*languages with full audio support
